title: IMMZD18SMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table Display Values
description: Display values for IMMZD18SMalaria ValueSet for Decision Table ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

First malaria dose from the primary seri.en: First malaria dose from the primary series was administered

Second malaria dose from the primary ser.en: Second malaria dose from the primary series was administered

Third malaria dose from the primary seri.en: Third malaria dose from the primary series was administered

Fourth malaria dose from the primary ser.en: Fourth malaria dose from the primary series was administered. The primary series has been completed
